metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_289
metadata.comment:
Rationale: p.36213: FIG. 1. Inwardly rectifying channel currents are seen when GIRK2 and GIRK3 are co-expressed in CHO-K1 cells. CHO-K1 cells expressing GIRK2 and GIRK3 were analyzed by patch clamp in the inside-out configuration in symmetrical 140 mM K

rule: NAS_MFCC-BP
rationale:
Protein has voltage-gated ion channel activity and is localized in teh presynaptic membrane (show with high-resolution technique). The inference to term 'voltage-gated ion channel activity involved in regulation of presynaptic membrane potential (GO:0099508)' is trivial and non-controversial.
Pinf_CC:
[P48543] SyNGO ID 286 (PMID:19558451, EM). Experimental description: Clone species not mentioned in MM: p.36211: CHO-K1 cells were transfected using TransIt

14/3/2017 Pim
- Species information traced back to PIMID:10341034 that states in the abstract " We recloned the GIRK3 subunit from **mouse** brain and found that the new clone differed significantly from that originally reported"

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
